title: calea nelsonii
intro: Calea nelsonii, also known as Nelson's Head or Mexican Skullcap, is a plant species native to Mexico and parts of Central America, belonging to the Asteraceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Calea nelsonii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and alleviating symptoms of digestive issues. Calea nelsonii can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or infusion, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote relaxation and overall well-being.
